text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Clothing Donation Programs * Men 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Children Disaster/Emergency Issues Infants/Toddlers Men Pregnant Individuals Women Youth Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ELEVATE HIM PROFESSIONAL CLOTHING AND HAIRCUTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides interview and work-ready clothing to help with the transition into the workforce and for appointments that require a professional appearance. Also provides professional haircuts. Clothing donations accepted. 1513 SW Marlow Avenue Suite A Portland, OR 97225 Eligibility: Males age 12 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm by appointment Email (503) 810-1607 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ELEVATE HIM PROFESSIONAL CLOTHING AND HAIRCUTS
